Name: user_departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON ("department_id") * FROM "public"."user_departments" ORDER BY "department_id" ASC) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."department_id" AS "department_id", "_root.base"."user_id" AS "user_id") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
